Compliance.description: National franchise operating without apparent regulatory violations; PAIA/POPIA documents present but no explicit PPRA/EA numbers published.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 1.9/5 from 14 reviews (all 1-star in 2025/2026); consistent complaints on service and tenant issues; no Google aggregate found.

Product Value.description: Core letting/management services at market rates; lacks pricing transparency.

Innovation.description: Basic property search website; no dedicated letting app, tenant portal, or advanced digital features found.

Customer Support.description: Reviews highlight unresponsiveness, ignored calls/emails, poor accounts dept; multiple branches but no strong support channels noted.

Accessibility & Security.description: Standard website accessibility; PAIA manual and privacy policy published indicating POPIA awareness; no security incidents found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Standard SA letting fees (est. 8-12% monthly management + 50-100% one month's rent leasing; no specific 2025/2026 published)

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter overwhelmingly negative (1.9/5); isolated FB complaints; sparse positive employee reviews.
